CREATE TABLE time_intervals (start_time TIMESTAMP, duration INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO time_intervals VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 12:00:00', INTERVAL '1 HOUR');
INSERT INTO time_intervals VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02 14:30:00', INTERVAL '5 HOUR');
SELECT start_time + duration AS end_time FROM time_intervals;
SELECT start_time, duration, start_time + duration AS new_time FROM time_intervals WHERE duration + INTERVAL '2 HOURS' > INTERVAL '4 HOURS';
CREATE TABLE additional_times (id INT, extra_duration INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO additional_times VALUES (1, INTERVAL '3 HOURS'), (2, INTERVAL '2 HOURS');
SELECT t.start_time, t.duration, (t.start_time + t.duration + a.extra_duration) AS final_time FROM time_intervals t JOIN additional_times a ON t.start_time < TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02 15:00:00';
SELECT (INTERVAL '1 HOUR' + INTERVAL '30 MINUTES') AS combined_interval;
SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 12:00:00' + (INTERVAL '1 HOUR' + INTERVAL '30 MINUTES') AS updated_time;
CREATE TABLE complex_data (event_time TIMESTAMP, event_duration INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO complex_data VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 08:00:00', INTERVAL '2 HOURS'), (TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 09:00:00', INTERVAL '30 MINUTES');
SELECT event_time, event_duration, event_time + event_duration + INTERVAL '1 HOUR' AS extended_time FROM complex_data WHERE event_duration + INTERVAL '15 MINUTES' < INTERVAL '3 HOURS';
WITH temp_intervals AS (SELECT start_time + duration AS finished_time FROM time_intervals) SELECT finished_time FROM temp_intervals WHERE finished_time > TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 13:00:00';
SELECT * FROM time_intervals WHERE (duration + INTERVAL '3 HOURS') < INTERVAL '10 HOURS';
SELECT (SELECT MIN(start_time) FROM time_intervals) + INTERVAL '4 HOURS' AS new_min_time;
